question: What is the probability that the daily average temperature at the French weather station at La Désirade will be higher on each resolution date listed below than on 2026-01-04?
resolution_criteria:
Resolves to the value found at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance/TEMPERATURE/celsius.78890.D once the data is published.

The exact value on 2026-01-04 is unknown, but the most recent known value (as of 2025-12-25) was 26.638. (The daily average temperature at the French weather station at La Désirade.)
background: The history of Average temperature by day and by station for France - Degree Celsius - LA DESIRADE METEO - Daily from Météo-France is available at https://db.nomics.world/meteofrance/TEMPERATURE/celsius.78890.D.
